creator: hubert.tournier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 241378
VuXML new entries for 20 vulnerable ports

A first batch of new VuXML entries for vulnerable ports discovered with pysec2vuxml (see https://github.com/HubTou/pysec2vuxml).

Others will follow this week-end.

Entries were verified with:
# cd /usr/ports/security/vuxml
# make validate
